---
title: "Rāg Pūrvī"
subtitle: "*E dhana dhana*"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.composer-info}
**Composer:** Sultān husain sirkī &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Tāl:** Tintāl (Madhyalay)
:::

## Lyrics {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics-block}

**Sthāyī**

> e dhana dhana caraṇ parasata haī ānanda  
> sukha bhayo mero tana mana caraṇ parasat

**Antarā**

> sultān jarā jarī jarā bakś nizāmuddīn auliyā

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" collapse="true"}
## Reading the notation

Tintāl is a 16-beat cycle divided as **4 + 4 + 4 + 4** (vibhāgs marked **X**, **2**, **O**, **3**). Each row below shows **one complete cycle**: the sixteen columns correspond to beats 1–16, with sam **X** at beat 1, **2** at beat 5, **O** (khālī) at beat 9, and **3** at beat 13. 

The sargam row gives the notes; the bold text row below it gives the lyrics syllables. A dash **-** indicates a held note or empty beat. Brackets $\lb{\cdot}$ denote meend (glide) or grouped notes; superscripts $\sps{\cdot}$ indicate the starting grace note of a glide; $\tr{X}$ denotes a note in the upper octave (tār saptak); $\mn{X}$ denotes a note in the lower octave (mandra saptak).
:::

## Sthāyī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .tintal}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   |   |   | **O** |   |   |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | G | M | P | P | P |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **e** | **-** | **dha** | **na** | **-** |
| $\lb{\mathrm{D}\mathrm{M}}$ | - | P | M | P | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{G}}\mathrm{m}}$ | G | - | m | G | $\lb{\mathrm{r}\mathrm{S}}$ | S | $\mn{\mathrm{N}}$ | S | r | - |
| **dha** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **na** | **-** | **-** | **ca** | **ra** | **ṇ** | **-** | **-** | **pa** | **ra** | **-** |
| G | m | g | - | r | - | g | M | P | M | P | D | M | P | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{G}}\mathrm{m}}$ | - |
| **sa** | **-** | **ta** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **haī** | **-** | **ā** | **-** | **-** | **na** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |
| G | r | - | $\lb{\mathrm{G}\mathrm{M}}$ | P | G | r | G | r | S | - | S | $\mn{\mathrm{N}}$ | r | G | M |
| **nda** | **-** | **-** | **su** | **-** | **kha** | **-** | **bha** | **-** | **yo** | **-** | **me** | **ro** | **-** | **ta** | **na** |
| P | $\lb{\mathrm{D}\mathrm{M}}$ | - | P | $\lb{\mathrm{M}\mathrm{P}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{G}}\mathrm{m}}$ | G | - | m | G | $\lb{\mathrm{r}\mathrm{S}}$ | S | $\mn{\mathrm{N}}$ | S | r | - |
| **ma** | **na** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ca** | **ra** | **ṇ** | **-** | **-** | **pa** | **ra** | **-** |
| G | - | - | - | m | - | G | - | r | - | - | - | - | - | - | - |
| **sa** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **t** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::

## Antarā {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .tintal}

| **X** |   |   |   | **2** |   |   |   | **O** |   |   |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | G | G | P | M | D |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **su** | **l** | **tā** | **-** | **-** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{r}}$ | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - |
| **n** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ja** | **rā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ja** | **rī** | **-** | **-** | **ja** | **rā** | **-** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | - | $\tr{\mathrm{r}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{r}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | - | N | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | D | N |
| **ba** | **k** | **ś** | **-** | **-** | **ni** | **zā** | **-** | **mu** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ddī** | **-** | **n** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | N | $\lb{\mathrm{D}\mathrm{P}}$ | P | M | P | M | P | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{G}}\mathrm{m}}$ | - | G | - | - | - | - | - |
| **au** | **li** | **yā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::
